Bug / Task Description: The PN-counter merge is not idempotent: merging a replica whose decrement state overlaps the local node's decrements double-counts those decrements instead of taking the per-node maximum, so repeated or identical merges keep changing the value. The increment half is correct and disjoint-node merges look fine, hiding the asymmetry.
Commit Subject: fix(crdt): PN-counter merge takes per-node max on decrements
